headline: Understand any confusing letter in seconds.
subhead: Paste the text, snap a photo, or just talk. ClearAid explains it in plain language, lays out exactly what to do, and points you to trusted local help.
demo_subtitle: One tap loads a real-world document and runs the whole pipeline.
input_choose: How would you like to start?
placeholder: Tell us what's going on, for example: 'I got this letter and I don't understand the deadline.' Or paste the notice, bill, or form here.
voice_prompt: Start talking, for example: “I got a letter saying I have three days to pay my rent or leave.”
upload_hint: Drop a PDF or image here, or tap to browse. Max 10 MB.
file_too_big: That file is over 10 MB. Please choose a smaller one.
footer: Private by design. ClearAid never files or submits anything for you.
voice_unsupported: Voice input isn't supported on this browser. Try typing instead.
no_action_steps: This document doesn't call for specific action steps. Head to the Summary tab for the full explanation.
source_hint: This is the exact text ClearAid read. Always check dates and dollar amounts against it.
finding_resource: Finding a trustworthy organization and checking it's the right fit
no_resource: We couldn't pin down a specific local organization for this one. The steps in your plan still apply, and 211.org or your local legal aid or benefits office can point you to help nearby.
ack_label: I verify that I will use this AI summary strictly as an organizational guide and understand that it does not provide official medical or legal decisions.
unlock_hint: Tick the box above to unlock the buttons below.
this_document_hint: Save a clean copy to keep or share, or start fresh with another letter.
your_privacy_hint: We store nothing on our servers. The only thing saved on this device is your checklist progress, and you can wipe it instantly.
disclaimer_body: ClearAid helps you understand and organize. It never files or submits anything for you, and it isn't a substitute for advice from a lawyer, doctor, or caseworker.
